name: streaming_unicode_field_key
description: Non-ASCII field-KEY stream: Root{ƛ: string, count: int} (field name U+019B). The input key Ƛ (U+A7DC) folds to match the field ƛ (matchesStringToString); the done-required int null-fills until complete. #555 Slice 2 admits non-ASCII string-literal/enum/field-name shapes into the native STREAM lane (checkStreamRootSupported narrowed): the streaming cadence is character-agnostic (done-required scalars null-fill until complete; partial strings shown) and the complete-value fold routes through the same bamlunicode-backed final coercer, so native reproduces BAML parse-stream byte-exact per prefix. Per-prefix want values are BAML v0.223 parse-stream (BAMLFUZZ_PARSE_CAPTURE=1); native==BAML for the fold is proven by the bamlunicode Rust reference.
